title: [kimi-review] 41df0fa: [SEVERITY: medium] If `std` is not a default feature (or isn
description:
Commit: 41df0fa31
Message: fix(lichen-schc): enable std feature for fragmentation integration test

Finding: [SEVERITY: medium] If `std` is not a default feature (or isn't declared in `[features]` at all), `cargo test` will now **silently skip** the fragmentation test target entirely — the commit's claim that "all 12 tests pass
close_reason: Fixed std feature test skip by updating test invocation and adding independent oracle cross-check with Python SCHC reference; cargo test + clippy pass
